claim: A pattern observed in early cases must continue.
object: Finite initial segment with later failure.

claim: A convincing diagram proves a geometric claim.
Graphs with the same degree sequence are isomorphic.
object: Non-isomorphic graphs sharing a degree sequence.
lesson: An invariant may distinguish some objects but not fully classify them.

claim: Checking many cases proves a universal theorem.
object: Large finite sample without exhaustive argument.
lesson: Computation suggests conjecture but does not always establish proof.
